title: alstroemeria ochracea
intro: Alstroemeria ochracea, also known as the Orange Peruvian Lily, is a species of flowering plant within the Alstroemeria genus, native to Peru. Alstroemeria ochracea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is also believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Alstroemeria ochracea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are commonly used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
